data.title: Only 30% of Russia’s crypto miners registered with tax service
data.description:
Efforts to legalize the activities of crypto miners in Russia haven’t been particularly fruitful and only about 30% have so far registered with the country’s tax authority. The assessment comes from the finance ministry in Moscow, which says it’s working to bring the rest of the growing industry out of the shadows, the main purpose […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/only-30-of-russias-crypto-miners-registered-with-tax-service/

data.title: Seamless Protocol Introduces Leverage Tokens: How Do They Work?
data.description:
TL;DR Seamless Protocol launched leveraged tokens on Base that package complex DeFi strategies into automatically managed ERC-20 assets. The first token offers a 17x staking loop on the weETH/ETH pair, with Ether Fi and Eigenlayer rewards, requiring no manual management or external rebalancing. Seamless plans to expand its lineup with directional exposure tokens, delta-neutral strategies,.
source: https://crypto-economy.com/seamless-protocol-introduces-leverage-tokens-how-do-they-work/

data.title: Amazon To Invest Over $233Mn To Scale Up Operations In India
data.description:
Catenaa, Thursday, June 19, 2025- Amazon will invest more than $233 million in India in 2025 to scale up its all-India operations network, the e-commerce giant said on Thursday. The investment builds on top of Amazon’s prior investments for the creation of an operations network to deliver to all serviceable pin-codes in the country. In […]
source: https://investors.catenaa.com/news/amazon-to-invest-over-233mn-to-scale-up-operations-in-india

data.title: Trump accuses entire Fed board of sabotage, reserves blame for ringleader Powell
data.description:

He went on Truth Social as per usual to say: “Too Late Powell is costing our […]

data.title: JP Morgan Executive Warns of ‘Overcrowding’ in Stablecoin Market Amid JPMD Trademark Filing
data.description:
Catenaa, Thursday, June 19, 2025- A JP Morgan executive expressed concerns over the growing fragmentation and potential “overcrowding” in the stablecoin market as the bank recently filed a trademark for JPMD, hinting at plans to launch its own digital currency. Emma Lovett, executive director overseeing JP Morgan’s markets distributed ledger technology and credit efforts, spoke […]
source: https://investors.catenaa.com/news/jp-morgan-executive-warns-of-overcrowding-in-stablecoin-market-amid-jpmd-trademark-filing

data.title: New Crypto Bubble? Research Warns About Public Firms Hoarding BTC, ETH, and SOL
data.description:
TL;DR Over 220 companies now operate as crypto treasuries, raising capital to accumulate Bitcoin and other assets without using collateral. Of the $44 billion raised by 12 firms, only a third was debt-financed, and 87% of that debt is unsecured, according to Presto Research. Analysts warn that this growing concentration could undermine Bitcoin’s appeal as. . . 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/new-crypto-bubble-research-warns-about-public-firms-hoarding-btc-eth-and-sol/

data.title: A whale withdrew 303.36 BTC from Deribit 6 hours ago, worth about 31.66 million US dollars
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a whale withdrew 303.36 bitcoins from Deribit 6 hours ago, worth about 31.66 million US dollars. In the past week, the whale has withdrawn a total of 1,303.35 bitcoins from Deribit, worth about 137.52 million US dollars.
